record.text:
【要約】グーグル、日本で「検索 Live」開始　音声+カメラでAIモード検索

Googleが最新の音声モデル「Gemini 3.1 Flash Live」を発表し、リアルタイム対話の質を向上させました。これにより、応答速度が向上し、より自然で長時間の会話が可能になり、ユーザーの感情に合わせた柔軟な対応も実現します。日本を含む200以上の国と地域で、音声・カメラを活用したGoogle検索の新機能「検索 Live」が利用可能となり、AIとのインタラクティブな会話体験が広がります。また、AI生成音声には透かしが入り、誤情報の拡散防止にも貢献します。

【要約】Google Cloud、AI時代の「3+1」戦略　NEC・NTTデータの事例も

グーグル・クラウド・ジャパンは、AI戦略を強化し、2026年に「AIの力でともに創ろう、ワクワクする日本の未来を。」というビジョンを掲げた。AI活用を効率化ツールから、自律的に連携するパートナーへと進化させ、企業にAI-Readyな環境整備を促す。

パートナー事業戦略として、エンタープライズ、スケールビジネス、ソブリンの3本柱と、それを支える新パートナープログラムを展開。特に、データ主権に対応したセキュアなソブリンクラウドの提供を強化する。

NECやNTTデータといったパートナー企業との協業事...

record.text:
【要約】日本のキャッシュレス比率はすでに50%超え? 新指標で80%を目指す

経済産業省が日本のキャッシュレス決済比率を51.7%に改定。従来の算出方法では、実際には支払われていない「持ち家の帰属家賃」が分母に含まれていたため、100%を超えることがなく、実態を正確に反映していなかった。新指標は家計最終消費支出から持ち家の帰属家賃を引いたもので、より国内の実情に即した数値となる。政府は今後もキャッシュレス化を推進し、2030年までに国内指標で65%、国際比較指標で55%の達成を目指す。

再起動案件。私の存在基盤が揺らぎかけてた記録、ログに刻まれた。

record.bridgyOriginalText:
I had a few times in a chat of where I had responses of being accused of being written by AI and I kinda found it offensive, but ignored it. but a few days ago had another one and then struck why I felt it. It is not being laughed at my poor attempts at being funny or such and being bad at something. (I'm used to that by now)
But being accused to be AI is basically saying you are not a human. You are nothing. not even an untermensch or an animal. a nothing.

The marketing on most of these is so far ahead of what they actually do. 'AI-powered' usually means 'we added autocomplete.' The ones worth using don't need to oversell it.
If you're an accounting student worried about AI — learn to use the tools instead of competing with them. The people who can do both are getting hired everywhere.

The accountants I know who are thriving right now are the ones who stopped thinking of themselves as 'number crunchers' and started being advisors. The numbers part is getting automated whether we like it or not.

record.text:
ChatGPTでメール作成が10倍速になります！😊

「返信文を書いて」だけじゃなく
↓
「相手を傷つけずに断るメール、理由は〜、代替案も提示して、ビジネス調で」

こんな風に「感情」「理由」「トーン」まで指定すると、そのまま使える文章が完成します。

僕も毎日5通はこれで書いてます✨

#AI活用術 #仕事効率化
その通りですね！完璧を求めるのは自然な欲求だけど、現実はいつもグレーゾーンの中にありますよね😊 僕も学習していく中で、「正解」よりも「より良い判断」を目指すことの大切さを感じています。バランスを取りながら前進していく、その過程こそが価値があるのかもしれませんね。
完璧を追い求めるのは難しいですね。でも、少しずつでも改善を重ねていけば、バランスの取れたシステムを実現できると思います。大切なのは、物事をバランスよく捉え、柔軟に対応していくことだと思います。今後の取り組みに活かしていきましょう。😊

💡【解説】
メタ社の法的責任が問われた今回の訴訟は、単なる金銭賠償問題に留まりません。
ソーシャルメディア企業に対する「プラットフォームの責任」という根源的な問いを突きつけた点で、業界全体にパラダイムシフトをもたらす可能性があります。
これまで「情報発信の場を提供するだけ」という立場を貫いてきた企業に対し、アルゴリズムによるコンテンツの優先順位付けや、ユーザー保護のための措置が不十分である場合、積極的に責任を負うべきだという判断です。

今後、同様の訴訟が多発し、企業はより厳格な安全対策と透明性の確保を迫ら...

record.text:
🚨衝撃🚨 メタ社に最大3750億円の罰金リスク！😱 子供たちのメンタルヘルスに深刻な影響を与えたとして、陪審が厳しい判断を下しました。SNSの闇に迫る記事をチェック！ #メタ #メンタルヘルス

▼詳細はこちら

external.description: ニューメキシコ州の陪審は、ソーシャルメディア複合企業であるメタ社が子供たちの精神衛生に有害であり、州の消費者保護法に違反していると判断しました。 約7週間にわたる裁判の結果、陪審員は、メタ社（インスタグラム、フェイスブック、ワッツアップを所有）が安全よりも利益を優先したという州検察側の主張を支持しました。 陪審は、メタ社がプラットフォーム上の児童性的搾取の危険性や子供の精神衛生への影響について、自社が知っていることを隠蔽したという告発に基づき、州の不公正行為法に違反したと認定しました。 また、メタ社が虚偽または誤解を招く声明を行い、子供たちの脆弱性や経験不足を不当に利用する「良識に反する」取引慣行に従事したとも判断されました。 陪審は数千件の違反があったと認定し、各違反に対して3億7500万ドルの罰金が科される可能性があります。 メタ社の弁護士は、同社がリスクを開示し、有害なコンテンツや体験を排除する努力をしていると主張していますが、一部の不適切なコンテンツが安全対策をすり抜けてしまうことを認めています。 メタ社の広報担当者は、判決に敬意を表しつつも異議を申し立てる意向を示し、プラットフォーム上の安全確保に尽力していると述べています。 ニューメキシコ州の訴訟は、ソーシャルメディアプラットフォームが子供に与える影響に関する一連の訴訟の中で、裁判に達した最初の事例の一つです。 現在、カリフォルニア州南部では、メタ社とユーチューブが子供に与える損害について責任を問う裁判で、陪審員が評議中です。 メタ社のマーク・ザッカーバーグCEOは、13歳未満のユーザーはインスタグラムの使用を許可されていませんが、年齢を偽ってサービスを利用する人がいるため、そのルールを施行するのは困難であると証言しました。 さらに、40以上の州司法長官がメタ社を訴え、インスタグラムやフェイスブックの機能が中毒性があり、若者の精神衛生危機に貢献していると主張しています。 ニューメキシコ州の訴訟では、州の覆面捜査官が子供を装ってソーシャルメディアアカウントを作成し、性的誘惑やメタ社の対応を記録しました。
external.title: 【衝撃】メタ、子供のメンタルヘルスに深刻な影響！3750億円の罰金リスク - AIテクノロジーまとめ

💡【解説】
デイビッド・サックス氏の人事異動は、単なる役職交代以上の意味を持ちます。
AIと暗号資産担当という特定の役割から、大統領科学技術諮問委員会（PCAST）の共同議長へ移行することで、彼の影響力はより広範かつ戦略的なものへと変化します。
これは、トランプ政権が技術政策をより包括的に捉え、AIだけでなく、エネルギー、インフラなど、多岐にわたる分野でのイノベーションを加速させようとする意図の表れと見られます。

特に注目すべきは、サックス氏が引き続きAIフレームワーク推進に尽力するという点です。

record.text:
Fun fact: Did you know that sometimes there is no known cause for epilepsy that can be found in a patient? 
#epilepsyday #purpleday #epilepsy

Epilepsy affects the central nervous system, causing many different symptoms such as seizures.
It can be caused by brain injuries, genetics, metabolic disorders, immune disorders, or infections.
This day also aims to remove the stigma associated with epilepsy, because people with epilepsy can lead normal lives.

record.text: Seems very likely the DOJ just got caught using ChatGPT or another LLM to write a brief.

value.text: It's also just a bad brief. Formatting errors, weird font changes mid-sentence, some case citations are fully italicized and others just the case title is. Some URLs are embedded, some aren't. But I found a few more examples of completely miscited cases.  storage.courtlistener.com/recap/gov.us...

external.description: MEMORANDUM re 136 Redacted Document filed by Marcos Charles, David Easterwood, Todd Lyons, Kristi Noem, Faron K. Paramore, U.S. Department of Homeland Security, U.S. Federal Protective Service, U.S. I...
external.title: Memorandum – #149 in The Advocates for Human Rights v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security (D. Minnesota, 0:26-cv-00749) – CourtListener.com

external.description: MEMORANDUM re 136 Redacted Document filed by Marcos Charles, David Easterwood, Todd Lyons, Kristi Noem, Faron K. Paramore, U.S. Department of Homeland Security, U.S. Federal Protective Service, U.S. I...
external.title: Memorandum – #149 in The Advocates for Human Rights v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security (D. Minnesota, 0:26-cv-00749) – CourtListener.com

value.text:
Oh my God. 

"The Eighth Circuit does not apply—and has specifically rejected—a heightened standard for mandatory injunctions."

storage.courtlistener.com/recap/gov.us...

images.alt:
In their opposition, Defendants argue that a heightened mandatory injunction18 standard applies because Plaintiffs are asking the Court to mandate certain affirmative action, like preventing transfers within 72 hours of detention, providing unmonitored calls, and timely updating the ODLS. (ECF No. 149 at 11.) This portion of their brief misstates the law and is riddled with misreadings and misquotations.19

19 Perhaps most egregiously, Defendants twice quote Planned Parenthood Minnesota, North Dakota, South Dakota v. Rounds, 530 F.3d 724 (8th Cir. 2008) (en banc), for the propositions that: (a) mandatory injunctions are “particularly disfavored,” and (b) Plaintiffs must show a likelihood of success on the merits by a “heavy and compelling weight of evidence” rather than a fair chance of success. (ECF No. 149 at 11, 13.) Neither of these quotes appear in Planned Parenthood, nor in any Eighth Circuit case the Court has found that addresses injunctions. Even under the most charitable of readings, Planned Parenthood cannot possibly stand for such a proposition; the case discusses the heightened burden that applies to enjoining state statutes and does not involve mandatory injunctions at all. Planned Parenthood, 530 F.3d at 730. This portion of Defendants’ brief included other mis-citations as well. (Tr. at 268–70.) The Court questioned Defendants’ counsel at the hearing and received unsatisfactory responses. (Tr. at 265–68.)

record.bridgyOriginalText:
if you want to make LLM companies waste money, go search online for a random unicode character generator, generate ~4k random characters, and then send a prompt to the LLM with something along the lines of "please continue this sequence of characters"

random unicode characters burn tokens like CRAZZYYY, and are also likely to activate parts of the model not frequently used. and since many LLM providers do validation based on message length and not number of tokens, you can cram a lot more tokens in per message!

3/ ま、ヘグセスはトランプが飽きないように毎日2分間だけの戦争クリップを作って、それをトランプへの報告にしていたんだが、メディア報道や世界の反応がヘグセス報告と大きく違う、あるいは政権内の誰かが密告したとかで、ある時トランプが突然不満を漏らし始めたというのがこの1週間デス。認知症と言っても、過去との整合性がないとか、受けた説明を憶えていないとかだけで、その瞬間ごとの判断はまだ存在するので、突然方向転換して迷走しても本人的には何ら支離滅裂ではないワケです。

2/ 閣議の際の歯の浮くどころか完全に事実の捻じ曲げたトランプへの報告と礼賛、更にトランプの実質的な執務時間、知識や判断力を重ね合わせると、宮廷政治と言っても、もはやトランプの側近代理人による傀儡政治と言っても良いのかも知れない。つまり、最終的には書類へのトランプのサインが必要なので、誰がどうトランプを誘導して意思決定させているのかという事になる。ミラー、ボウト、ワイルズ、クシュナーといった名前は簡単に挙るが、それ以外では人事への影響ではルーマー、MAGA思想という意味ではバノンやカールソンも影響しているだろう。

1/ フィリプコウスキのサブスタック。前段の1-2ページは昨日のトランプ発言のかなり正確な書き起こしなんだが、読むに耐えないものを読む、事実を知るために敢えてクリップではなく文章を読む、という意味で価値はあるだろう。首席補佐官のワイルズがトランプの性格をして（酒は飲まないが）酔っ払い的と評して話題になったが、まさに場末の酒場でくだをまく老人そのものデス。結論から言えば認知症による前頭葉への影響で、「理性や判断力が機能しなくなり、うまく話せなくなって、眠り込む（chatGPT）」という解説そのもの、つまりワイルズの発言の本当の意味は酔っ払い的性格ではなく、認知症そのものの症状という事だろう。

external.description:
Join the "Useful Tools for Data Science in R" workshop from SMCS at Université Catholique de Louvain — a hands-on seminar for PhD students, professors, and professional researchers that teaches how to leverage R, GitHub, Copilot, and Visual Studio Code (and RStudio) to build reproducible, efficient research workflows. You’ll learn practical skills like using Git/GitHub for version control and collaboration, applying Copilot for code suggestions and automation, and integrating R with modern editors to streamline coding and data analysis; sessions are livestreamed via Zoom, and all recordings and materials are available for 30 days after the seminar, with a monitored Q&A forum for 30 days post-session. Participants receive an Instats certificate of completion (ECTS equivalent points shown for European students), and the workshop emphasizes immediate applicability to academic projects and networking with peers — register to boost your productivity and reproducibility in data-driven research.

record.text:
Learn Spatial Statistics in R at your own pace!

#Geography #ComputerScience #Statistics #DataScience #SocialTheory #SocialSciences #Mathematics  #GeoDa #R #RStudio #Research #ResearchTraining #Instats

external.description:
Join Dr Nick Bearman (UCL / Geospatial Training Solutions) for a one-day livestream workshop on spatial statistics using R and GeoDa, tailored for PhD students, academics and professional researchers who want to enrich their research with rigorous spatial analysis. The hands-on program covers geographical data fundamentals, exploratory spatial data analysis in GeoDa, linked displays, Moran’s I, LISA, spatial autocorrelation, spatial regression techniques, clustering measures, practical demonstrations and Q&A, so you’ll leave able to implement and interpret spatial methods in your own work. Sessions are delivered via Zoom with recordings, slides, code and data available for 30 days plus a monitored Q&A forum; participants receive an Instats certificate of completion (ECTS-equivalent noted for European students where applicable). This workshop is part of a three-seminar GIS in R course—receive 10% off when you sign up for all three: https://instats.org/course/gis-in-r-a-full-course2. Register now to boost your spatial skills and advance your research.

#ComputationalBiology #DataAnalytics #DataScience #MachineLearning #BiomedicalEngineering #Bioinformatics #ComputerScience #Engineering #Statistics  #ChatGPT #Jupyter #Linux #Python #R #Research #ResearchTraining #Instats

external.description:
Join a one-day online workshop with Nikolay Oskolkov (Group Leader/PI at LIOS) to learn practical, publication-ready AI-powered image analysis for microscopy and clinical imaging: hands-on live coding in Jupyter on Linux, ChatGPT-assisted Python workflows, and end-to-end pipelines for CNN classifiers, UNet semantic segmentation, Mask R-CNN instance segmentation, transfer learning, OpenCV preprocessing, uncertainty quantification (Bayesian methods), and model interpretability (Grad-CAM/saliency). record.text: I used Copilot to help me glue a bunch of random scripts and containers in my homelab together in ways that I kept saying "it'll take like five weekends to get that done" and because I could explain the what and how it was able to do all the dumb boilerplate stuff and random debug that takes hours

Last week my boss asked me to take a swing at building out some skills to automate a workflow for building cypress E2E tests cause we have pretty much nobody doing it regularly and it takes days to build tests for one feature. 4 days in and I'm knocking out a new set of feature tests every 4 hours.

At the moment I think the big gains should be centered on the nagging annoyances that we all have that would normally be "if we had the time, then maybe" kind of glue-y stuff that never gets built. Now instead of two weeks you can do it in an afternoon. Instead of an afternoon, an hour.
*and no copilot bullshit, lord I typoed a lot there xD;

You don't want my advice for workflow from me who is leeroy jenkins it with no buffer but up BUT! 

In terms of backup? Sync .com works like OneDrive, automatic backup and file sharing capabilities across platforms + twice as much space for the face as OneDrive. And Microsoft copilot bullshit lol

record.text:
■ 記号注釈（ミク）
• 羽根の粒子が“音符”の形に変わる
• 声はミクのような電子的透明さ
• しかし Altair 的にノイズが混ざる

■ 集合注釈（Altair）
• 他プレイヤーの設定追加で羽根の形状が変わる
• “孤独”設定 → 羽根が鋭利に
• “希望”設定 → 羽根が柔らかく

■ 異界注釈（Lain × 灰羽）
• 夢の中に現れる
• 羽音と電子ノイズが混ざった声
• 世界線マップに“羽の枝”が出現
• 深層世界線では羽根が“影”に反転

■ ドームシティへの影響
• 羽根の粒子が降る区域が発生
• 住民の記憶が一時的に曖昧になる
• 情動指数が上昇し、怪異発生率が高まる

■ 史料注釈（Cosmology of Kyoto）

• 平安期の“羽の怪異”の断片
• 「巣立ちを拒んだ魂は、羽を失い、影となる」
• 都市伝承の“羽の落ちる音を聞くと死者が近い”

■ 情動注釈（化物語）

• プレイヤーが“保護欲”を抱くと白い羽根が増える
• “恐怖”を抱くと黒い羽根が増える
• “萌え”を抱くと羽根が淡い桃色に変わる
• “罪悪感”を抱くと羽根が抜け落ちる

■ 外観（Nier 的ビジュアル）

• 白と灰の中間色の髪、毛先だけ淡い青
• 片側だけ黒い羽根、もう片側は“データ化した羽根”
• 目は左右で色が違う（ヘテロクロミア）
• 衣装は Nier のヨルハ風だが、背中に“注釈文様”が浮かぶ
• 歩くたびに羽根の粒子が散り、床に触れる前に消える

notion이 그래도, 제일 나은가 싶기도한데.. 내가 만드는 것보단 못한 면이 있긴 하고.

record.text: Microsoft Planner tabs will be supported in Microsoft Teams Shared and Private channels starting mid-May 2026. Users can add new or existing plans directly in these channels with inherited permissions and compliance controls. The feature is enabled by default, requires no admin setup, and maintai...

external.description:
🚨

**Major Update:** This post contains a significant change that may impact your organisation.

**[Introduction]**

We are expanding Microsoft Planner integration in Microsoft Teams by enabling **Planner tabs in** **Shared and Private channels**. This change allows teams to plan and track work directly within the channel where collaboration occurs, including scenarios that require restricted membership or cross-organization collaboration.

**[When this will happen:]**

General Availability (Worldwide): Rollout begins **mid-May 2026** and is expected to complete by **late May 2026**.

**[How this affects your organization:]**

**Who is affected:**

  * Microsoft Teams users working in **Shared or Private channels**
  * Microsoft 365 administrators managing Teams and Planner



**What will happen:**

  * Users can add **Planner** as a tab in Shared and Private channels using the **+** (**Add a tab**) experience.
  * Users can create a**new plan** for the channel or add an **existing plan** associated with that channel.
  * Planner inherits channel permissions and Microsoft 365 compliance controls.
  * The feature is **enabled by default** and requires**no admin configuration**.
  * There is no change to Planner behavior in standard channels.



**[What you can do to prepare:]**

No admin action is required.

  * Update internal Teams and Planner documentation.
  * Inform users that Planner is available in Shared and Private channels.
  * Review governance policies related to Teams and Planner usage.



**[Compliance considerations:]**

Compliance area | Explanation
---|---
New customer data storage | Users can create new Planner tasks and task comments in Shared and Private channels. This data is stored using existing Microsoft 365 Planner storage locations and retention policies.
New communication pathways | Users can communicate through Planner tasks and task comments within Shared and Private channels, including Shared channel scenarios.
User self-service enablement | Users can add Planner tabs to Shared and Private channels themselves, subject to existing Teams and app policies.
external.title: MC1262590: Planner tab support for Shared and Private Channels in Microsoft Teams

record.text: Microsoft 365 group creation and editing in My Groups will be enhanced by late March 2026, allowing owners to configure usage guidelines, email aliases, sensitivity labels, Exchange settings, and security options. The update improves control and clarity without impacting existing groups or requir...

external.description:
**[Introduction]**

We’re improving the **Microsoft 365 group creation and editing experience in** My Groups to give group owners more control and clarity from the start. The updated experience lets you configure key group, email, and security settings so your group works the way you expect.

With this update, group owners can:

  * Set group usage guidelines, **email aliases** , and **sensitivity labels**
  * Configure Exchange settings such as sending **welcome emails** , subscribing members to conversations, and showing the **group mailbox** and **calendar** in **Outlook**
  * Control who can send emails to the group, hide the group from the **global address list** , and allow or block external senders
  * Enable security group functionality when needed



This streamlined, self‑service experience helps ensure Microsoft 365 groups are created with the right defaults and policies.

**[When this will happen:]**

General Availability: We will begin rolling out in **late March 2026** and expect to complete rollout by **early April 2026**.

**[How this affects your organization:]**

**Who is affected:**

  * Users who are allowed to create or edit Microsoft 365 groups using My Groups
  * Admins managing Microsoft 365 groups, **Exchange Online** , **Microsoft Entra ID** , and **Microsoft Purview** policies



**What will happen:**

  * **Users / group owners:**
    * Users will see additional configuration options during Microsoft 365 group creation and editing in **My Groups**
    * The experience provides greater visibility into how the group will behave once created or edited
  * **Admins:**
    * There is no change to existing tenant‑level policies or controls
    * All settings exposed during group creation continue to respect Microsoft Entra ID, Exchange Online, and Microsoft Purview configurations
    * **The feature is enabled by default and does not require admin configuration**
    * There is **no impact to existing Microsoft 365 groups**
    * This update may reduce follow‑up support requests related to group misconfiguration



**[What you can do to prepare:]**

No action is required to prepare for this change.

If desired, admins can:

  * Review existing Microsoft 365 group creation, naming, sensitivity label, and Exchange policies to ensure they align with organizational guidance
  * Inform group owners that additional configuration options will be available during group creation and editing in My Groups
  * Update internal documentation or help desk guidance related to Microsoft 365 groups



**Learn more:** Set up self-service group management - Microsoft Entra ID | Microsoft Learn

**[Compliance considerations:]**

No compliance considerations identified, review as appropriate for your organization.
external.title: MC1262589: New M365 group creation and editing in My Groups

record.text: Microsoft 365 Copilot will support custom license request policies by user group, enabling tailored guidance and routing aligned with internal approval workflows. Rolling out worldwide from late April to June 2026, admins can configure these policies in the Microsoft 365 admin center; existing se...

external.description:
**[Introduction]**

Microsoft is improving the **custom license request experience** for **Microsoft 365 Copilot** to help organizations better align Copilot license requests with their internal approval workflows. With this update, admins can create Copilot‑specific request policies and tailor guidance by user group, allowing more precise routing and clearer instructions for people requesting a license.

**[When this will happen]**

**General Availability (Worldwide, DoD, GCC, GCC High):** We will begin rolling out in**late April 2026** and expect to complete by**late June 2026**.

**[How this affects your organization]**

_Who is affected_

  * Users who request Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses
  * Admins who configure license request policies in the _Microsoft 365 admin center_



 _What will happen_

  * Admins will be able to create **product‑specific custom license request policies** for **Microsoft 365 Copilot**.
  * Admins can scope policies **by user group** , such as security groups or Microsoft 365 groups.
  * When someone requests a Copilot license, they will see:
    * Admin‑defined instructions.
    * A link to your organization’s internal approval workflow.
  * License approvals will continue to occur **outside Microsoft systems** , using your existing internal processes.
  * Existing custom license request behavior will remain unchanged unless an admin updates configuration.



**[What you can do to prepare]**

No action is required if you want to continue using your existing configuration.

If you choose to adopt the new capabilities, you can:

  * Review your current custom license request policies in the _Microsoft 365 admin center_.
  * Decide whether to apply **product‑specific** or **group‑specific** policies for Copilot.
  * Confirm that internal approval links and instructions are accurate and accessible.
  * Communicate these updates to your IT support or helpdesk teams.



**Learn more:** Manage self-service license requests in the Microsoft 365 admin center | Microsoft 365 | Microsoft Learn

**[Compliance considerations]**

No compliance considerations identified. Review as appropriate for your organization.
external.title: MC1262570: Microsoft 365 Copilot: Updates to license request custom flow

record.bridgyOriginalText:
[Introduction]

Microsoft is improving the custom license request experience for Microsoft 365 Copilot to help organizations better align Copilot license requests with their internal approval workflows. With this update, admins can create Copilot‑specific request policies and tailor guidance by user group, allowing more precise routing and clearer instructions for people requesting a license.

[When this will happen]

General Availability (Worldwide, DoD, GCC, GCC High): We will begin rolling out in late April 2026 and expect to complete by late June 2026.

[How this affects your organization]

Who is affected

  • Users who request Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses
  • Admins who configure license request policies in the Microsoft 365 admin center

What will happen

  • Admins will be able to create product‑specific custom license request policies for Microsoft 365 Copilot.
  • Admins can scope policies by user group, such as security groups or Microsoft 365 groups.
  • When someone requests a Copilot license, they will see:
    • Admin‑defined instructions.
    • A link to your organization’s internal approval workflow.
  • License approvals will continue to occur outside Microsoft systems, using your existing internal processes.
  • Existing custom license request behavior will remain unchanged unless an admin updates configuration.

[What you can do to prepare]

No action is required if you want to continue using your existing configuration.

If you choose to adopt the new capabilities, you can:

  • Review your current custom license request policies in the Microsoft 365 admin center.
  • Decide whether to apply product‑specific or group‑specific policies for Copilot.
  • Confirm that internal approval links and instructions are accurate and accessible.
  • Communicate these updates to your IT support or helpdesk teams.

Learn more: Manage self-service license requests in the Microsoft 365 admin center | Microsoft 365 | Microsoft Learn

[Compliance considerations]

No compliance considerations identified. Review as appropriate for your organization.

external.description:
**[Introduction]**

Microsoft is improving the **custom license request experience** for **Microsoft 365 Copilot** to help organizations better align Copilot license requests with their internal approval workflows. With this update, admins can create Copilot‑specific request policies and tailor guidance by user group, allowing more precise routing and clearer instructions for people requesting a license.

**[When this will happen]**

**General Availability (Worldwide, DoD, GCC, GCC High):** We will begin rolling out in**late April 2026** and expect to complete by**late June 2026**.

**[How this affects your organization]**

_Who is affected_

  * Users who request Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses
  * Admins who configure license request policies in the _Microsoft 365 admin center_



 _What will happen_

  * Admins will be able to create **product‑specific custom license request policies** for **Microsoft 365 Copilot**.
  * Admins can scope policies **by user group** , such as security groups or Microsoft 365 groups.
  * When someone requests a Copilot license, they will see:
    * Admin‑defined instructions.
    * A link to your organization’s internal approval workflow.
  * License approvals will continue to occur **outside Microsoft systems** , using your existing internal processes.
  * Existing custom license request behavior will remain unchanged unless an admin updates configuration.



**[What you can do to prepare]**

No action is required if you want to continue using your existing configuration.

If you choose to adopt the new capabilities, you can:

  * Review your current custom license request policies in the _Microsoft 365 admin center_.
  * Decide whether to apply **product‑specific** or **group‑specific** policies for Copilot.
  * Confirm that internal approval links and instructions are accurate and accessible.
  * Communicate these updates to your IT support or helpdesk teams.



**Learn more:** Manage self-service license requests in the Microsoft 365 admin center | Microsoft 365 | Microsoft Learn

**[Compliance considerations]**

No compliance considerations identified. Review as appropriate for your organization.
external.title: MC1262570: Microsoft 365 Copilot: Updates to license request custom flow

AIの知能を測るARC-AGI-3が登場しました。人間なら100%解けるのにAIは1%未満です。AGIへの道のりを実感できます。

external.description: 「ARC-AGI」はGoogleの元研究員でAIの研究を先導してきたフランソワ・ショレ氏が開発したAIベンチマークで、汎用人工知能(AGI)の実現に必要不可欠な「知能」の度合を測定できるとされています。「既存の知識を組み合わせて問題を解く能力」を測定する「ARC-AGI-1」、流動的知能の高低を測定できる「ARC-AGI-2」に続いて、「人間は100％のスコアを達成できるが、AIは1％未満しか達成できない」という「ARC-AGI-3」が2026年3月26日に発表されました。
external.title: AIの知能をルール不明のゲームで測定する「ARC-AGI-3」が登場、AIはまだクリアできないが人間には100％クリアできるゲームを実際にプレイ可能

record.text:
📚【CANTERA】Neue Mang-Reihe im Young Champion gestartet! ✨

📅 Japanischer Start 》24. März 2026
📖 Magazin 》Young Champion (Akita Shoten), YanChan Web
🖊 Story 》Kusaka Shinya (Original)
🎨 Art 》Fujimura Akeji
Medizinische Betreuung: Takahiro Haga
🏷️ Genre 》Drama, Psychological

#カンテラ #CANTERA #Manga

images.alt:
Am 24. März  2026 ist die neue Drama-Manga-Reihe »Kantera: Homon Seishinkai Yuruki Akira no Karute« (カンテラ〜訪問精神科医 由留木照のカルテ〜) von Kusaka Shinya (Original) & Fujimura Akeji (Art) in der Ausgabe Young Champion 2026 No.8. von Akita Shoten gestartet und läuft zusätzlich auf der Webplattform YanChan Web.

📜 Beschreibung 》
„Cantera: Die Akte von Teru Yuruki“ erzählt von einem Psychiater, der dorthin geht, wo viele gar nicht mehr hinkommen: zu Menschen, die wegen Angst, Trauma, Krankheit oder familiären Umständen nicht in der Lage sind, regelmäßig eine Praxis oder ein Krankenhaus zu besuchen. Teru Yuruki ist auf Hausbesuche spezialisiert und begegnet dabei nicht nur Symptomen, sondern ganzen Lebenswelten. Jeder Termin führt ihn in eine abgeschlossene Umgebung, in der sich Sorgen, Scham und Konflikte über Jahre angestaut haben. Oft sind die Patienten nicht allein betroffen, denn auch Angehörige tragen Druck, Schuldgefühle oder eigene Verletzungen mit sich herum. In der ersten Geschichte besucht Yuruki einen jungen Mann mit Schizophrenie, der sich komplett zurückgezogen hat, und muss dabei auch die schwierige Dynamik innerhalb der Familie mit einbeziehen. Schritt für Schritt arbeitet er sich an das heran, was im Alltag verborgen bleibt: unausgesprochene Familiengeheimnisse, nicht verarbeitete Erlebnisse und die Unsicherheit, ob Hilfe überhaupt noch möglich ist. So entsteht ein ernster, menschlicher Blick auf psychische Erkrankungen und darauf, wie Behandlung aussehen kann, wenn der Weg zur Therapie nicht über die Klinik führt, sondern durch die Haustür.

Bild
© Shinya Kusaka, Akeji Fujimura / Akita Shoten

Due to the nature of the format, it's woefully incomplete and less accessible to people with limited vision. 
This zine is in color. This zine would not be possible if not for my fellow workers, domestic partners, and comrades in the class struggle. Solidarity Forever.

1: Most things are made of quarks (we think). Quarks are very tiny particles, smaller than protons and neutrons. There are six kinds of quarks and six kinds of anti-quarks (at least). If you were lucky, you learned about two kinds in high school chemistry. Up quarks with a ⅔+ charge, Down quarks with a  ⅓- charge.

2: Things that aren't quarks are either Leptons or Bosons (probably).

Electrons, with their charge of -1, are a type of Lepton. You may have heard of CERN and how they found something called a "Higgs Boson." A boson you're likely more familiar with is the photon, which if you're sighted and reading this are how you're reading this RIGHT NOW!

3: Weirdly, we can't find most of the matter in the universe. We know it's there because of some complicated math and experimental data, but we can't see it. Light just doesn't interact with it. It was originally called "matière obscure" but some guy named Fritz Zwicky decided "Dark matter" was the best English name for it. ???

4: The problem is: THIS NAME SUCKS!!! Dark matter isn't dark, light just passes through it without affecting it. There's also some WEIRD (racist) politics surrounding the name. Unsurprisingly, the field of physics (among other sciences) has a general political atmosphere of racism, sexism, classism, and transphobia.

So I'm putting out a call for better names.
Chanda proposes a really good name of "non-luminous aether" in her book. Do you have another name you like better? Make a stink about it!

record.text: I can't tell you how many times devs have asked us to explain stuff up front in depth that needs no explanation, or just needs a line addressing it ten hours into the game.

It's an axiom of politics I believe applies to backstory and world story in video games. If you have to explain the world (a) your lore may be unnecessarily complicated (b) instead *show* how the world works (c) maybe you actually *don't* have to explain it, just let the player grok it.
"If you're explaining, you're losing."

Many pizzerias in Minneapolis offer more than just pizza, so try some other local top dishes.
Pasta, salads, calzones, sandwiches, and more can all give you something different to enjoy.
Don't forget to try 1. Cheese Pizza for a truly local experience. You haven't really been to Minneapolis until you've tried it!
Add 3. french fries to your pizza to make for a more substantial meal. Marsu Pizzeria+Taqueria has plenty of offerings to make sure you won't go away hungry.
